scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/sync-contract && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.test:cov: npm run test:cov -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/sync-contract && tsc --project apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc --project apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
